data.title: Whale Transfers ASTER Tokens to Aster Platform
data.description: A significant holder of ASTER tokens, who accumulated $80.61 million worth of ASTER at a peak price of $1.61 last September, has made another transfer to the Aster platform. Analyst @ai_9684xtpa posted on X that the whale moved 4.96 million ASTER tokens, valued at approximately $3.25 million, from address 0x2A4…1368E to a new address two hours ago. The purpose of this transfer remains unknown.

data.title: Coinbase: Has reached a compromise with banks on stablecoin yield terms; Senate crypto bill poised for advancement.
data.description: Coinbase stated that a compromise has been reached with traditional banks regarding key disagreements over stablecoin holding rewards, clearing a path for the U.S. Senate to advance a cryptocurrency market structure bill. Previously, banks had lobbied to restrict or prohibit exchanges from offering rewards to stablecoin holders, primarily due to concerns about funds flowing out of the banking deposit system. Coinbase Chief Policy Officer Faryar Shirzad stated that the final proposal, while adding some restrictions, still retains the space for users to earn rewards through crypto platforms and networks based on real-world use cases. This development is expected to push the "Clarity Act" into the Senate Banking Committee for a vote, further clarifying the division of responsibilities between the SEC and CFTC in the regulation of crypto assets. (Bloomberg)

data.title: The Ethereum Foundation sold another 10,000 ETH via OTC, bringing the total number of ETH sold in the past month and a half to 30,000.
data.description: The Ethereum Foundation sold 10,000 ETH to Bitmine via over-the-counter (OTC) trading early this morning at an average price of approximately $2,292, for a total transaction value of approximately $22.92 million. Public data shows that the foundation has sold a total of 30,000 ETH in the past month and a half, including 5,000 ETH sold via OTC at approximately $2,043 on March 15, 5,000 ETH sold via on-chain swap on April 11 ($2,221), and another 10,000 ETH sold via OTC at approximately $2,387 on April 24.

data.title: Whale Closes Bitcoin Position with Minor Profit
data.description: On May 2, a significant cryptocurrency holder, identified by the address starting with '0xa0d', closed a position involving 200 Bitcoin at 4 a.m. UTC+8. According to BlockBeats On-chain Detection, the transaction resulted in a minor profit of $100,000. The total assets of this whale address are currently valued at approximately $16.44 million. Known for short-term trading strategies, the account has accumulated total profits of around $5.4 million.

data.title: Zcash Foundation Urges Immediate Upgrade to Zebra 4.4.0 Due to Security Vulnerabilities
data.description:
The Zcash Foundation has officially announced the release of Zebra 4.4.0, addressing several critical consensus-level security vulnerabilities. According to ChainCatcher, the update is strongly recommended for all node operators to implement immediately. The vulnerabilities include a denial-of-service flaw that could permanently halt new block discovery, errors in block signature operations (sigops) counting leading to consensus discrepancies, abnormal handling of transparent transaction signature hashes, and risks of memory allocation amplification attacks.

The Zcash Foundation warns that some of these vulnerabilities may cause Zebra nodes to accept blocks rejected by zcashd, potentially resulting in chain forks. Without timely updates, nodes could face interruptions in block discovery, consensus forks, and increased resource consumption, with no alternative mitigation solutions currently available.

data.title: USDT Reserves Show Increase in Gold Holdings by March End
data.description:
A recent report reveals that by the end of March, USDT reserves included gold valued at $19.8 billion, equivalent to approximately 132 metric tons at the market price at that time. According to ChainCatcher, this marks an increase from 126 metric tons at the end of December last year, although gold constitutes only 10% of the reserves.

The majority of USDT reserves are composed of U.S. Treasury securities valued at $117 billion, with Bitcoin accounting for $7 billion. The current circulation of USDT stands at $189.5 billion.

data.title: CLARITY Act Text on Stablecoin Yield Released, 55% Chance of Becoming Law by 2026
data.description: Senators Thom Tillis and Angela Alsobrooks have released the final text of the CLARITY Act, focusing on stablecoin yield regulations. According to NS3.AI, Polymarket traders currently estimate a 55% probability of the bill being enacted into law by 2026. Faryar Shirzad noted that this development resolves a significant issue that was delaying the bill's progress. The legislation prohibits interest or yield payments solely for holding payment stablecoins, while still permitting rewards linked to genuine crypto platform or network activities.

data.title: BNB Chain Memecoin B Surges 155% in 24 Hours
data.description: BNB Chain's memecoin B experienced a significant surge, rising 155% in the past 24 hours. According to NS3.AI, this increase pushed its market capitalization to over $325 million. During the same period, the trading volume for memecoin B reached $65.4 million.

data.title: Crypto Sentiment Remains Neutral as Fear & Greed Index Slightly Increases
data.description: CoinMarketCap's Crypto Fear & Greed Index has seen a minor increase, rising from 44 to 45, while maintaining a Neutral sentiment reading. According to NS3.AI, the index measures market sentiment on a scale from 0 to 100, ranging from Extreme Fear to Extreme Greed. This slight uptick suggests that investor sentiment remains steady, with no significant shift towards either fear or greed in the cryptocurrency market.

data.title: UK Considers Delaying Digital Pound Development Amid Private Sector Innovations
data.description: The UK Treasury and the Bank of England are contemplating slowing down the development of the digital pound, known as 'Britcoin.' According to Foresight News, insiders have revealed that UK officials are considering a 'compromise solution' to delay the progress of this central bank digital currency (CBDC), rather than making a final decision to approve or abandon the project this summer. One reason for the inclination to postpone full-scale development is the potential for private sector innovations, such as tokenized deposits, to offer alternative solutions that enable faster and cheaper payments while utilizing the existing regulated banking system. Currently, Bank of England Governor Andrew Bailey remains skeptical about the necessity of a retail digital pound. Meanwhile, the European Central Bank is advancing its digital euro initiative, whereas the United States has halted its work on central bank digital currencies.

data.title: In-Depth Analysis of RWA Projects: RealT, Ondo, Centrifuge, and Pre-IPO Equity
data.description: According to PANews, a comprehensive study has been conducted on four major U.S. projects in the Real World Asset (RWA) sector: RealT, Ondo, Centrifuge, and Pre-IPO equity. The analysis delves into the process of asset tokenization, compliance frameworks, and revenue models. It also explores the institutional logic and technological foundations that could lead to a global financial restructuring by 2025, highlighting the potential for early adoption of on-chain assets.

data.title: xAI Launches Voice Cloning API with Multilingual Support
data.description: xAI has announced the launch of its API featuring Voice Cloning capabilities. According to PANews, users can create custom voices within approximately two minutes or select from a library of over 80 preset voices covering 28 languages. These voices can be utilized in various applications such as voice assistants, audiobooks, and video game characters. The feature is currently available only to users in the United States, excluding those in Illinois.

data.title: Expert Warns of Trust Erosion in DeFi Due to Security Incidents
data.description: NH Investment & Securities analyst Hong Seong-wook cautioned in a report dated April 30 that ongoing security breaches could undermine confidence in decentralized finance (DeFi). According to NS3.AI, Hong suggested that DeFi projects might need to collaborate with traditional financial institutions to enhance security and compliance measures, or potentially face acquisition by these firms, as the tokenization of real-world assets (RWA) expands.

data.title: CFTC Chair Predicts Legalization of Crypto Perpetual Contracts in the U.S.
data.description: CFTC Chair Michael S. Selig has indicated that genuine crypto perpetual contracts might be legalized in the United States within the next few weeks to a month. According to NS3.AI, Selig mentioned that the Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) is working on resolving classification issues related to perpetual contracts to replace the existing quasi-perpetual workarounds.

data.title: U.S. President Donald Trump on Iran: No Premature Withdrawal
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump has stated that the United States will not make a premature withdrawal concerning the situation in Iran. According to NS3.AI, Trump's comments come amid ongoing tensions and discussions about the U.S. military presence in the region. The President emphasized the importance of strategic decision-making and maintaining stability in the Middle East. This stance reflects the administration's broader foreign policy approach, aiming to balance national security interests with diplomatic efforts.

data.title: Beeple's Robot Dogs With Billionaire Faces Roam Berlin Gallery
data.description: Digital artist Beeple has unveiled his latest installation, 'Regular Animals,' at the Neue Nationalgalerie in Berlin, featuring robot dogs with hyper-realistic silicone heads of famous figures like Elon Musk, Jeff Bezos, and Mark Zuckerberg. According to BeInCrypto, these autonomous robots roam the gallery, capturing images of visitors and generating AI art, which they print from their backsides. The installation, blending robotics, AI, and celebrity culture, also offers visitors free NFTs linked to the project. 'Regular Animals' will be on display until May 10, 2026.

data.title: Blockstream CEO Adam Back Sees Bitcoin as Future Economic Dominator
data.description: Blockstream CEO Adam Back has positioned Bitcoin treasury companies as arbitrage plays between the current fiat financial system and a future dominated by Bitcoin. According to BeInCrypto, Back suggests that firms buying Bitcoin today benefit from accelerating BTC adoption and the depreciation of fiat currencies. This creates substantial upside for early accumulators, positioning them as asymmetric bets on systemic transition. Back's thesis aligns with Michael Saylor's prediction of Bitcoin reaching $10 million per coin, though it faces skepticism from critics like Peter Schiff.

data.title: a16z Warns CFTC About State-Level Prediction Market Rules Impact
data.description: a16z has submitted an 18-page comment letter to the Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) on May 1, expressing concerns over state-level prediction market regulations. According to NS3.AI, the firm warned that these rules could potentially drain liquidity and restrict user access. a16z highlighted that cease-and-desist orders and proposed state bans create obstacles that conflict with the CFTC's rules on fair market access. Additionally, a16z emphasized that blockchain-based prediction markets offer greater transparency due to the auditability of on-chain transactions.

data.title: Compromise Clarity Act Targets Stablecoin Yield Payments
data.description: The Compromise Clarity Act, unveiled on Friday, aims to prohibit stablecoin issuers from offering yield solely for holding payment stablecoins, while allowing certain activity-based rewards. According to NS3.AI, Senators Thom Tillis and Angela Alsobrooks released the text following extensive negotiations to differentiate crypto rewards from traditional bank deposit products. Cody Carbone from the Digital Chamber expressed optimism that the release could advance the bill towards a Senate Banking Committee markup.

data.title: Alberta Investment Management Corporation's Investment in MicroStrategy Yields Significant Gains
data.description: Alberta Investment Management Corporation (AIMCo) has disclosed its acquisition of approximately 1.38 million shares of MicroStrategy (MSTR) in the first quarter, with an investment amounting to $172 million. According to Odaily, the current market value of this holding has risen to approximately $241 million, reflecting a profit of around $69 million. AIMCo's average purchase price was about $125 per share. AIMCo previously held shares in the company from 2019 to 2020 but sold them shortly after MicroStrategy adopted a Bitcoin reserve strategy.
